name: unum
description: Unum reactive PluresDB bindings — now a thin wrapper over @plures/pluresdb. Reactive state and Svelte runes are built into the WASM layer.
author: Plures
notes: Reactive PluresDB bindings (state_watch, Svelte stores) now live in the pluresdb-wasm layer. This plugin provides backward-compatible @plures/unum APIs.
